From: Oliver Robbins 
Sent: Friday, April 11, 2025 6:07:29 PM
To: 
 
Cc: Peter Mandelson ; James Roscoe ; Nicholas Alton ; Serena Stone 
Subject: Thank you
OFFICIAL
Thank you for all the work that went into our visit this week when I can see how busy you and 
the whole team are.
Serena and I got a lot out of it and we're really grateful for the variety of the programme you 
put together for us.
And very nice to get to know you a bit!
Olly
—
Oliver Robbins
FCDO

Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
